specs.title: server recomputes totals from DB and ignores forged client amounts

protected admin APIs reject calls without a session (401)

empty-cart checkout page shows the empty state, not a broken form
wrong password -> 401 and no session cookie issued
empty password -> 401
unknown route returns 404 with a rendered page (no white screen)

oversized search input does not crash the page
rapid double ADD increments quantity without error
no uncaught exceptions across the main routes
header brand, search bar and logo-to-home all work
category strip links to every category page
